items.title: AI-Assisted Discovery Quality Release
items.description: Release focused on better broad-intent shopping resolution through search refinement, Rufus guidance, and stronger recommendation grounding.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of shopping sessions that reach a relevant product detail decision surface quickly.
Increase repeat orders by making product discovery less effortful.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve shopping habit strength through better first-session utility.

productBricks.change: Improve ranking and category refinement for broad-intent shopping.
Improve assistant grounding and product comparison responses.
Improve recommendation quality on entry and detail surfaces.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated shopping assistant and search treatments to iOS.
Roll out updated shopping assistant and search treatments to Android.

items.title: Prime Promise Reliability Release
items.description: Release focused on improving promise precision, order-tracking clarity, and self-service issue recovery.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of shipments delivered inside the communicated window.
Reduce the need for live-agent support on common order issues.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase renewal confidence through more reliable post-purchase convenience.

productBricks.change: Improve promise accuracy and exception visibility.
Improve order-state explanations and tracking events.
Improve self-service return and refund flows.

deliveryChannels.change: Release improved order and returns flows on web.
Release supporting promise and post-purchase services.

items.title: Seller Buyability and FBA Release
items.description: Release focused on improving launch readiness, inventory alerts, and FBA planning for priority sellers.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of planned launches reaching buyable state on time.
Increase Prime-eligible fulfillment coverage where it improves sales and service levels.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase service attach and seller growth on strategic cohorts.

productBricks.change: Improve launch-readiness validation and listing completion guidance.
Improve inbound workflow and capacity-awareness for FBA planning.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated seller workflows and operational reporting.

items.title: Retail Media Measurement Release
items.description: Release focused on reducing wasted spend from retail mismatches and improving advertiser measurement clarity.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase retail-media efficiency on strategic accounts.
Improve marketer confidence in budget reallocation decisions.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve advertiser retention and budget depth through stronger measurement trust.

productBricks.change: Improve campaign safeguards against unbuyable product states.
Improve retail and media performance reporting alignment.
Improve incrementality and measured spend workflows.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated Amazon Ads reporting and optimization views.
Release expanded measurement outputs for enterprise workflows.
